channel.title: SSbreakingHeadlines
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from SSbreakingHeadlines, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Knicks lead Spurs 1-0 in NBA Finals ahead of game 2
item.description: The New York Knicks face the San Antonio Spurs in game 2 of the NBA Finals with a 1-0 series lead.

item.title: Flesh-eating screwworm found in Texas for first time in decades
item.description: The USDA reports the New World screwworm fly has been detected in South Texas, a first in decades.

item.title: U.S. destroys alleged drug boat in Pacific, killing 2 more people
item.description: At least 207 people have been killed since the Trump administration began targeting those it calls "narcoterrorists" in September.

item.title: SPLC asks judge to weigh sanctions against DOJ for sending out unsigned indictment copy
item.description: The Southern Poverty Law Center requested a judge consider sanctioning federal prosecutors after the DOJ shared an unsigned and unstamped copy of a su...
